projects.title: TSLies - Time Series anomaLies
projects.description: Open-source Python framework for anomaly detection in multivariate time series, integrating neural networks and statistical learning methods.

projects.title: ACDAnomalies: Satellite Anomaly Detection Pipeline for the Fermi Anti-Coincidence Detector
projects.description: Implementation of TSLies for a ML pipeline for transient detection on the Fermi Anti-Coincidence Detector.

projects.title: ATS: Anomalies in Time Series
projects.description: Modular ML pipelines for transient detection and distributional shift analysis on large-scale satellite monitoring data.

projects.title: FermiFilters: Data Infrastructure for Filtering Fermi Data
projects.description: Development of reproducible data-access workflows, preprocessing pipelines and scalable storage solutions for large scientific datasets.
